name: CYNOROID GAIDEN
detailed_description:
This is a mouse-aimable (free-aiming) side-scrolling action game.

Four dungeons and 20 levels await you!

Shoot, carve, and smash!

////////
Story

"NO19827

A mechanical voice woke me up today.
I wonder where I died last time.

I can't remember. As usual, I am covered in gunpowder and blood.

"NO 19827, test commencing."
"Please proceed to the test dungeon."

When am I going to get past this dungeon?
No, I don't think I want to go through it.

Always.
I just want to keep fighting.

May your 19827th life be a good one.

Translated with www.DeepL.com/Translator (free version)
